title: LKS advises Futura Medtech on investment in Rivarp Medical
description: Futura Medtech, a portfolio company of Jashvik Capital, has made a strategic investment in Rivarp Medical Private Limited.Lakshmikumaran & Sridharan Attorneys advised Jashvik Capital and Futura Medtech on this transaction. The firm’s role included conducting legal due diligence on Rivarp Medical, drafting and negotiating the definitive transaction documents, and assisting with closing and completion-related matters.The transaction team consisted of Gaurav Dayal (Executive Partner), Sushrut B
